---
title: "Sites Econometria"
output: html_document
#date: "2023-06-30"
---




**** Marginal Revolution University
https://mru.org/


*** Seeing Theory - A visual introduction to probability and statistics

https://seeing-theory.brown.edu/index.html


**********     Nick Huntington-Jlein    *****

https://theeffectbook.net/index.html     ****  The Effect Book

https://nickchk.com/index.html

https://github.com/NickCH-K/causalgraphs



**********    Scot Cun

https://www.scunning.com/mixtape.html
